query:
SELECT m.matchedItemName, m.lineDescription, m.unitPrice, m.quantity, i.purchaseAmount, i.unit, m.invoiceId
FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m
JOIN inventoryItems i ON i.id = m.inventoryItemId
WHERE m.matchedItemName IN ('Ham', 'Mozzarella', 'Peppers', 'Olive oil', 'Garlic - Dehydrated', 'Chicken')
AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 90001 AND 90272
AND m.matchStatus = 'auto_matched'
ORDER BY m.matchedItemName, m.invoiceId DESC
LIMIT 40

FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m
JOIN inventoryItems i ON i.id = m.inventoryItemId
WHERE m.matchedItemName IN ('Ham', 'Mozzarella', 'Peppers', 'Olive oil', 'Garlic - Dehydrated', 'Chicken')
AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 90001 AND 90272
AND m.matchStatus = 'auto_matched'
ORDER BY m.matchedItemName, m.invoiceId DESC
LIMIT 40
